title: Emptiness And Dependent Origination
definition: The Buddhist understanding of the emptiness of all phenomena, including self and other, and their interdependence in a process of constant change.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The Buddhist understanding of the emptiness of all phenomena, including self and other, and their interdependence in a process of constant change.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The Buddhist understanding of the emptiness of all phenomena, including self and other, and their interdependence in a process of constant change.
difficulty_levels.expert: The recognition that the very concept of a separate observer is an illusion, leading to the release from the cycle of suffering.

extra_fields.insight: The recognition that the very concept of a separate observer is an illusion, leading to the release from the cycle of suffering.
